text: You know the thing is? I think we're aliens, man.
Maybe this footage, we have it right now.
And then after 20 years, people are like, "Yo, Jackson—Jackson said it 20 years ago. He said it. We are aliens."
Hey, guys, this is Jackson Wang. I'm here with Mindset answering 21 questions.
Let's go.
First one is: describe your Mindset in three words.
Focus.
Real.
Honesty.
Yeah.
If you could wake up tomorrow and possess any new skill in the world, what would it be and why?
I would want to have the ability of realizing who is real to me.
Who's there for me.
They're there. Like the real, real, real brothers and sisters.
What are you most proud of accomplishing in life?
I didn't do anything yet.
It's in the process of making it happen, so we'll wait for that day.
What is your third greatest fear?
Third?
Yo, this is so specific.
My first, I think, is insects.
Like, I just can't do with cockroaches, man. Like, it feels like aliens to me. Like, I can't.
I can't have an engagement with a person with eight legs, man.
I love you for having the life, but I can't. I'm afraid. I'm afraid of you.
Stay away from me.
I'm going to stay away from you.
You have your life. I have my life.
I can't do with cockroach. I really can't.
What is your zombie apocalypse survival philosophy?
Oh, what am I?
What is my philosophy when I meet zombies?
Stand still, man. Just pretend you're dead.
You just got to accept when you're there, when the zombie comes.
Do whatever he says, she says.
If he wants to suck your blood, do it, man.
You have no choice.
You can't run.
Just accept the fact and play along.
What is your method of dealing with awkward moments?
Just leave.
Who do you look up to the most in your life?
Honestly speaking, my artists, the artists that really inspired me was Michael Jackson and Prince, James Brown.
Like, I feel like they they focus on art, nothing else.
They're true, true legend artists that I feel like this generation, we need to respect that and feel and learn from it.
If you could choose to live in any period of history, what would it be?
I will choose to live maybe 500 years... from now.
You know the thing is? I think we're aliens, man.
I think we're aliens. Tell me if I'm wrong.
Maybe this footage, we have it right now.
And then after 20 years, people are like, "Yo, Jackson—Jackson said it 20 years ago. He said it. We are aliens."
What is one item in your closet you can wear every single day?
Yo, these days, I'm wearing—I'm always wearing this t-shirt.
I have 20 of this.
It's ust plain good quality t-shirts.
Where is your comfort place?
DIVE Studios.
What is something you would pass down to the future generation?
I feel like the... maybe I'm not successful. I fail, whatever it is.
But whoever that comes across to my content, I'll tell them like,
"Hey, you guys are so talented in your own field. Don't be scared of it.
Trust your gut feeling. Don't rely on other people.
Trust your gut feeling and rely on yourself."
Take a moment to record a message for yourself to hear a year from now.
Yo, be alive and...just do what you do and trust yourself.
That's it.
What fictional character would you want to meet in real life?
I would want to meet Spider-Man.
I love Spider-Man.
But in some way, I love him so much. At the same time, I really want to do stunts with him.
I want to show him, "Hey, I understand what you do, but look at what I do."
You get what I mean?
What always brings a smile to your face?
True, like, honesty.
Becoming the best chef in the world vs. becoming the best actor in the world.
None of it.
If your life story was a movie, what would it be titled?
I've no idea. I never thought about that.
You guys think too big of me.
Are there any hidden talent that you have?
Hidden talent?
I have 결벽증 (mysophobia).
So, I think my talent is to clean your house.
I will tidy everything, your closet, whatever—it has to be in a logic way.
That's it.
I don't like messy.
Describe your perfect day.
Everybody, just my team, my company, just leave me alone, and I can just sleep on my bed.
Don't text me.
Horror movie vs. action movies?
Action movies.
What is your most beautiful memory?
I think it's my most life-changing memory is when my mom and my dad, they worked like 3 to 4 jobs a day when I was a kid,
and they came home, they were—they were literally lying on the floor.
And me as a kid, I was eating candy and all that shit.
And I walked, and I witnessed it.
I'm like, "Oh."
My parents were warriors.
They're lying on the floor.
I need to protect them.
I need to put them under my arm.
That's my goal.
Any last words for fans and viewers?
I said it a million times.
Whatever you guys want to do in life, know about yourself, what you really, really want to do, what your passion is.
And don't listen to anybody.
Just do it.
If you have the passion for it, if you have the love for it, you do it.
You will know if you can do it or not.
You will know yourself.
You're strong as yourself. It's about you. It's your life.
So be strong. And I'm here to support you as an entertainer.
And I love you guys.
Alright.
DIVE Studios, Daebak Show, this is Jackson Wang.
Thank you.
